title: IPQS
description:
IPQualityScore (IPQS) provides enterprise-grade fraud prevention, risk analysis, and threat detection. This connector drives three IPQS API families with a single API key:

- Fraud-and-risk-scoring endpoints (/ip, /url, /email, /phone) for IPv4-Addr, Email-Addr, Phone-Number, Domain-Name, and Url observables
- Darkweb-Leak endpoints (/leaked/email, /leaked/username, /leaked/password) for User-Account observables
- Malware-file-scanner endpoints (/malware/scan, /malware/lookup, /postback) for Artifact observables

Key features:

- IP address fraud scoring and proxy detection
- Email address validation and risk assessment
- Phone number verification and fraud detection
- URL and domain reputation analysis
- Artifact malware scanning with cache-first lookup
- Malware and phishing detection
- Darkweb-Leak lookup for User-Account observables
short_description: IPQualityScore connector enriches IPs, emails, phones, URLs, domains, user accounts, and file artifacts with fraud scores, risk analysis, darkweb leak data, and malware detection.
